subcodes.title: TALO LOA FAKA-PITOA
subcodes.first_line:
## TALO LOA FAKA-PITOA

KE FAI FAKA-TASI I TE SEFULU-FA ITULA

A ia te la e fai ne ia a te talo tenei, e tu a ia ki luga
subcodes.notes: auto-unlinked (moderate-ratio) from BH03447 — Header 'TALO LOA FAKA-PITOA' = Long Obligatory Prayer, not Medium
